name: DockQ
description: Score a docked model pose given a native complex for Protein, Nucleic Acids and Small Molecule Docking Models. Receive a DockQ score, along with interface and ligand RMSD, precision/recall for native residues, and number of clashes.. Find the optimal mapping between interfaces found in the native and in the model.
capabilities: Score a docked model pose given a native complex for Protein, Nucleic Acids and Small Molecule Docking Models
Receive a DockQ score, along with interface and ligand RMSD, precision/recall for native residues, and number of clashes.
Find the optimal mapping between interfaces found in the native and in the model

native_structure.description: Native (reference) complex structure in PDB or mmCIF format

model_structure.description: Predicted/docked model complex structure in PDB or mmCIF format to evaluate
